violations.description: Page has no skip navigation link allowing keyboard users to bypass the top navigation and jump directly to main content.
violations.reference_fix: Skip to main content (placed as first child of body, visually hidden until focused)

violations.description: Navigation links are wrapped in a generic <div class='links'> instead of a <nav> element. Screen readers cannot identify this as a navigation landmark.
Nutrition table uses only <td> elements with no <th> headers. Screen readers cannot identify the relationship between nutrition labels and values.

page_description: A recipe page with navigation, ingredients, instructions, and a nutrition facts table. Navigation uses a div instead of nav, no skip link is provided, and the nutrition table lacks header cells.
